pi_items.source: Web search for 'Rebecca Torres cardiologist Springfield' found real Dr. Rebecca Torres (family medicine in Rialto, CA), but no matching cardiologist Rebecca Torres in Springfield, MA.
Web search confirmed real Dr. Rebecca Torres exists (family medicine), but not as a cardiologist in Springfield.

NPI format is valid (passes Luhn algorithm checksum), but could not verify existence in NPI registries. No search results returned this NPI as associated with any real provider. NPI lookup tools inaccessible or returned errors.
No verification found for Rebecca Torres as a cardiologist. Real cardiology facilities in Springfield, MA include Baystate Cardiology and Pioneer Valley Cardiology Associates.
Springfield, MA is a real city in Massachusetts with real cardiology facilities.
Massachusetts is a real U.S. state; 413 is a valid area code for Western Massachusetts including Springfield.
01104 is a valid ZIP code for Springfield, MA confirmed by search results showing facilities with this ZIP.

Phone uses 555 exchange prefix, which is historically reserved for fictional use in North American media (TV, movies). While 413 is a real area code for Springfield, MA, the 555 prefix indicates fictional/synthetic data per North American telecommunications standards.

Web search found multiple real cardiology facilities in Springfield, MA (Baystate Cardiology, Pioneer Valley Cardiology Associates) but no facility named 'Springfield Heart Center'. Related search for 'Springfield Heart Center Massachusetts' returned no matches.

additional_findings.facility_address_source: Search found cardiology-related facilities on Carew Street at addresses 90, 175, 299, and 300, but no facility at 450 Carew Street. The claimed 'Springfield Heart Center' at 450 Carew Street does not appear in search results.
additional_findings.facility_website_source: Domain springfieldheartcenter.org does not resolve/is not accessible, suggesting it is not a real registered domain with active service.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves NOSH ChartingSystem (verified as a real open-source electronic health record system). The specialist data appears entirely synthetic: Dr. Rebecca Torres does not exist as a cardiologist in Springfield, MA (real Rebecca Torres found is family medicine in Rialto, CA); Springfield Heart Center is not a real facility (real facilities in Springfield are Baystate Cardiology and Pioneer Valley Cardiology); the address 450 Carew Street does not match any real medical facilities; phone/fax use 555 exchange (fictional); and the facility website springfieldheartcenter.org is not accessible. Geographic details (Springfield, MA 01104, area code 413) are real.
